title: Bistro Jug 17.5oz / 0.5ltr - Pack of 6
features: Perfect for serving water and juices
description: From the manufacturer About Us Widely regarded as one of the most respected tableware companies, Utopia pride themselves on their comprehensive range of stylish, durable and cost effective glasses for the hospitality trade. Utopia offer several glassware innovations across their range, from the super safe, fully toughened glass to the Activator Max and Activator Performance nucleation. Utopia glasses are designed specifically for the functionality and style required for intense commercial use. Utopia E068 Bistro Jug, 0.5 L (Pack of 6) Running a business is complicated enough. These robust and extremely strong glass jugs from Utopia have a tried and trusted shape which minimises breakages. This simple, unfussy glass jug has a rounded body and compact pouring lip. Good for use as an iced water jug or juice jug and suitable for commercial dishwashing.
